title: mentzelia albicaulis var. ctenophora
intro: Mentzelia albicaulis var. ctenophora is a rare and endemic variety of the wildflower Mentzelia albicaulis, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoid compounds. The health benefits associated with Mentzelia albicaulis var. ctenophora include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusion or decoction of the roots, leaves, or flowers, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
